title: British Chicken Stew
description: A hearty and comforting British-inspired stew made with tender chicken and a rich broth. Perfect for a cold winter's day.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew seasoning packet and stir to combine.
Add the chopped bitter and stir to combine.
Pour in enough water to cover the chicken and bitter, about 2 cups.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Check the chicken for doneness. If not done, cover and simmer for another 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
